docs.title: Welcome to the Britdan Archives
docs.text:
This website will searve as the perminant home for all of my projects, old and new, going forward.

This is everything from mappacks to mods to tilesets to projects and much, much more.

docs.title: Work In Progress
docs.text: This website is still a massive work in progress, so please keep in mind that everything is still vulnerable to change. And typos will likely always appear but I do appriciate any reports.

docs.title: The Britdan Archive Hit-List
docs.text: These projects have since been lost to time, but I'm always on the hunt to redescover them, if you think you might have it DM me on Discord @britdan.

docs.title: 1-1 Trolled
docs.text: 1-1 Trolled is a mappack that is exactly what it sounds like, a troll mappack of just 1-1.

docs.title: Mari0 Mappacks
docs.text: Welcome to home of Britdan's Mappacks!

docs.title: 12 Maps Of Christmas 1
docs.text:
Mappack CardFirst LevelTileset

The mappacks icon, name and description.

A screenshot of the first level from the mappack.

The edited tileset used in the mappack.

12 Maps Of Christmas is a winter themed platformer based on SMB and released for Alesan99's Entities, Originally released on the 6th of December, 2018. The mappack features some really badly designed levels and is not worth playing today.

docs.title: Videos
docs.text: there exists 2 videos of some early development of the mappack that we're made private but I'm releasing here now, with the first being of special relevence as it would mark the first time I ever voice revealed.

docs.title: Links
docs.text:
Both the original mappack as well as a fixed port are avaialble to download here. The port only fixes issues caused since release due to AE updates, No content has been changed. I recommend using the fixed port as the original version is here mainly for archival purposes.

Fixed Download Original Download

Original Post

docs.title: 24 Rooms
docs.text:
Mappack CardFirst LevelTileset

The mappacks icon, name and description.

A screenshot of the first level from the mappack.

The tileset used in the mappack.

24 Rooms (Of Enemies) is a mappack where the goal is to kill all the enemies in each room, and was based on an SMW rom hack called 100 rooms of enemies, the mappack was released for Alesan99's Entities, Originally released on the 16th of March, 2019. The mappack is quite boring and not worth playing these days.

The mappack icon was made by Alesan99

docs.title: Minecr0ft
docs.text:
Mappack CardFirst LevelTileset

The mappacks icon, name and description.

A screenshot of the first level from the mappack.

The tileset used in the mappack.

Minecr0ft Is a short 1 world mappack split into 6 full scale levels based on Minecraft and released for Alesan99's Entities on the 7th of May 2020. It features several areas based on the game from plains to underground to the nether and end. The mappack also comes with a built in "Creative" mode that is rather disapointing.

As well as the final version, a Demo was released that contains just the first level, it is almost the same as the final version minus some small things like lacking mobs and a custom font.

There was also an unreleased expansion that was meant to be souly focused around a "Creative mode" but was scrapped because it would not be worth the effort when people could just use the editor.

Minecraft is a platformer mappack based on Minecraft and released for Alesan99's Entities, Originally released on the 3rd of June 2018. The mappack is really poorly made and has the strangest story to it where I claim that Mario is Steve's father.

docs.title: Snapshot
docs.text:
Mappack CardFirst LevelTileset

The mappacks icon, name and description.

A screenshot of the first level from the mappack.

The tileset used in the mappack.

Snapshot is a time freezing puzzle mappack released for Alesan99's Entities, Originally released on the 9th of September 2019. The mappack didn't feature any actual time freeze, instead making use of sublevels to emulate time being frozen. It's a really stupid map that barely qualifies as a puzzle.

docs.title: Videos
docs.text: There exists 2 videos of some early development builds of the mappack that we're made private but I'm releasing here now, with the first being VERY early.

docs.title: The Candle
docs.text:
Mappack CardFirst LevelTileset

The mappacks icon, name and description.

A screenshot of the first level from the mappack.

The tileset used in the mappack.

The Candle is a horror themed short mappack where mario explores and abandoned building of some kind and runs into an evil spirit who torments him for killing and released for Alesan99's Entities, Originally released on the 30th of October, 2018. The mappack isn't that great but still have good ambinace and atmosphere. There exists 2 seperate versions, V1 only has the first chapter as well as a hub world which was later cut, and V2 contains both chapter 1 and 2.

docs.title: Links
docs.text:
Both the original mappack as well as a fixed port are avaialble to download here. The port only fixes issues caused since release due to AE updates, No content has been changed. I recommend using the fixed port as the original version is here mainly for archival purposes.

docs.title: The Only Level Is Me
docs.text:
Mappack CardFirst LevelTileset

The mappacks icon, name and description.

A screenshot of the first level from the mappack.

The edited tileset used in the mappack.

The Only Level Is Me is a puzzle(?) mappack where the general level design is always the same but the theme, exit and features can change and released for Aleaan99's Entities, Originally released on the 17th of January, 2019. There exists 2 seperate versions, V1 is pretty poor quality and contains several bugs and softlocks, A V2 was released to sort most of them out and also gave it a propper icon.

docs.title: Up And Away 1
docs.text:
Mappack CardFirst LevelTileset

The mappacks icon, name and description.

A screenshot of the first puzzle and level from the mappack.

The edited tileset used in the mappack.

Up And Away is a portal puzzle mappack heavly inspired by portal released for Alesan99's Entities, Originally released on the 25th of February, 2018. It was met with less than steller reviews but we all start somewhere, nowerdays it's not really a mappack that's worth playing.

docs.title: Videos
docs.text: There was also a walkthrough series that was less of a walkthrough and more of a poor playthrough that dies a lot that has since been unlisted but they can now be found here.

docs.title: Up And Away 2
docs.text:
Mappack CardFirst LevelTileset

The mappacks icon, name and description.

A screenshot of the first puzzle and level from the mappack.

The edited tileset used in the mappack.

Up And Away 2 (Offically subtitled as "A portal too far") is a portal puzzle mappack heavly inspired by portal, based on the original mappack Up and Away 1 and released for Alesan99's Entities, Originally released on the 3rd of April, 2018 being released just over 1 month after the original mappack. It's aged a lot worse than the original mappack and is not worth playing anymore.

docs.text: The original tileset was based on a tileset by reapergraff (Original Post)

docs.title: Up And Away 3
docs.text:
Mappack CardFirst LevelTileset

The mappacks icon, name and description.

A screenshot of the first puzzle and level from the mappack.

The tileset used in the mappack.

Up And Away 3 (Offically subtitled as "Back In Line") is a portal puzzle mappack heavly inspired by portal but with assets resembling the original SMB, based on the original mappack Up and Away 1 and released for Alesan99's Entities, Originally released on the 21st of October, 2018 being released 6+ months after the original mappack. It's aged pretty poorly and a lot of the logic is no longer functioning making it a terrible playing expirience today.

docs.title: Credits
docs.text: Despite being mostly original, several tiles are still based on a tileset by reapergraff (Original Post)

docs.text:
Mappack CardFirst LevelTileset

The mappacks icon, name and description.

A screenshot of the first level from the mappack (Without darkness).

The edited tileset used in the mappack.

Witch Valley is a platformer mappack based on a map by Alesan99 called "The Witch Village" and released for Alesan99's Entities, Originally released on the 19th of August, 2019. This mappack is odd as it's the only mappack ever to be based on a mappack I never made and likly i will never do something like this again, it's decent at best with some really annoying sections.
